name: Chicken burger
ingredients: chicken, breadcrumbs, onion, garlic, cheese, lettuce, burger bun
steps: mix chicken, shape patties, coat breadcrumbs, fry chicken, toast buns, add cheese, serve burger

name: Spicy Fried Chicken
ingredients: chicken, chili powder, garlic paste, flour, egg, oil
steps: marinate chicken, coat with flour, deep fry until crispy

name: Chicken Shawarma
ingredients: chicken, yogurt, garlic, pita bread, onion, mayo
steps: marinate chicken, grill chicken, wrap in pita with sauce

name: Paneer Burger
steps: mix paneer filling, shape patties, fry patty, assemble burger

name: Veg Pizza
ingredients: pizza dough, cheese, tomato sauce, onion, capsicum, olives
steps: spread sauce, add toppings, bake pizza until cheese melts

name: Crispy French Fries
steps: cut potatoes, deep fry, season with salt and pepper

name: BBQ Chicken Pizza
ingredients: pizza dough, chicken, bbq sauce, cheese, onion, capsicum
steps: spread sauce on dough, add chicken and toppings, bake until cheese melts

name: Cheese Sandwich
ingredients: bread, cheese, butter, onion, tomato, pepper
steps: apply butter on bread, add cheese and vegetables, grill until crispy

name: Veg Roll
steps: cook vegetables, fill chapati, roll tightly, serve hot

name: Corn Cheese Balls
steps: mix ingredients, shape balls, fry balls, serve hot

name: Chicken Nuggets
steps: shape nuggets, coat nuggets, fry nuggets, serve hot

name: Egg Sandwich
steps: cook egg, toast bread, add filling, serve hot

name: Chicken Popcorn
steps: cut chicken, coat chicken, fry pieces, serve hot

name: Mini Shawarma
steps: cook chicken, add sauce, roll wrap, serve hot
